sys_ui_page.description:
New UI Page to prompt from Platform about deleting Tasks and subtasks
2.7.0 | 2021-08-28 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal New UI Page to prompt about Task and subtasks when deleting from Platform 2.7.0 | 2021-09-03 | mmcc | DFCT0010476 - "Acknowledgement Prompt" does not have an "Acknowledge" button so users cannot use Tasker Changed class modal-body to dtech-modal-widget-body; changed footer tag to a div. Changed class dtech-modal-footer to dtech-modal-widget-footer; dropped class flex. 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Updated styleSheets array to use tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages. Changed CSS Selector .dtech-perm-delete to use .dtech-standard-text-color. Chnaged to use OnCancel() and onSubmit(). 2.7.0 | 2021-09-26 | raj | DFCT0010541- When deleting "Draft Scheduled Tasks", it does NOT redirect anywhere.
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Warning Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this task. Are you sure you want to continue? Tasker - If this task has subtask(s), they will also be deleted Tasker - Button - Delete Task

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!

${jvar_taskNumberShortDescription}
${gs.getMessage('Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this task. Are you sure you want to continue?')}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - If this task has subtask(s), they will also be deleted')}


${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Delete Task')}
sys_ui_page.name: delete_task_prompt
